label: Mesh 引用
description: 在 Geometry DSL 末尾追加 mesh(filename,scale) 一行，引用外部 OBJ/STL/DAE 等 mesh 资源。
description-en: Append a `mesh(filename,scale)` line to the Geometry DSL, referencing an external mesh resource.

inputs.name: bbox_min
inputs.label: 包围盒最小角
inputs.description: 可选未缩放局部 AABB 最小角 [x,y,z]（米），通常接 g_bake_part.bbox_min。填上后阶段2 场景里该 mesh 可按 scale 解出 AABB，QC overlap 检测才生效；缺省则 mesh 不可解 AABB（missing_aabb，overlap 被跳过）。
inputs.description-en: Optional unscaled local AABB min corner [x,y,z] (meters), usually wired from g_bake_part.bbox_min. When set, the scene mesh resolves an AABB (scaled by scale) so QC overlap detection works; absent means the mesh has no resolvable AABB (missing_aabb, overlap skipped).

inputs.name: bbox_max
inputs.label: 包围盒最大角
inputs.description: 可选未缩放局部 AABB 最大角 [x,y,z]（米），通常接 g_bake_part.bbox_max。必须与 bbox_min 成对提供。
inputs.description-en: Optional unscaled local AABB max corner [x,y,z] (meters), usually wired from g_bake_part.bbox_max. Must be provided together with bbox_min.
